options.name: -detail
options.description: report detail info for every via

options.name: -on_clock_nets
options.description: If specified, the command reports vias only on clock nets in the design. If not specified, the command reports vias on all nets in the design by default. The option can be used with -detail, -special and -regular options.

options.name: -on_selected_nets
options.description: If specified, the command reports vias only on the nets selected by user. If not specified, the command reports vias on all nets in the design by default. The option can be used with -detail, -special and -regular options.
